  3. James Ignatowich

United States

James Ignatowich

Modern power, quick hands, and aggressive transitions

Biography

James Ignatowich came from a high-level tennis background and brought a very modern offensive approach into pickleball. He is useful to study for drive-to-crash patterns, counter battles, transition attacks, and how young pros combine content, personal branding, and competition.

Major skills

Drive attacksCounter exchangesKitchen pressureAthletic recoverySpin pressure

Career notes

  • Pickleball.com profile notes Vanderbilt tennis and PPA Indoor National Championship golds.
  • Known for fast rise, aggressive style, and media/podcast presence.
  • Founder/associated with RPM paddle brand content.

Events

SinglesMen’s doublesMixed doubles

Paddle / sponsor line

RPM / Selkirk history; sponsored equipment varies

What to study

Study when the drive is used to set up the next ball.

Live sources
